headline: **Wave K â€” admin console UX overhaul + microinteraction sweep + 4 frontend bug fixes (no SDK behaviour change).**

highlights.title: `@mushi-mushi/cli` `0.3.0`
highlights.description: New `mushi init` command â€” interactive wizard built on `@clack/prompts` that auto-detects framework (Next, Nuxt, SvelteKit, Angular, Expo, Capacitor, plain React/Vue/Svelte, vanilla), package manager (npm/pnpm/yarn/bun), installs the right SDK, writes env vars with the right prefix (`NEXT_PUBLIC_`, `NUXT_PUBLIC_`, `VITE_`), warns when `.env.local` isn't gitignored, and prints the framework-specific snippet. Idempotent: never overwrites existing `MUSHI_*` env vars. Exposes new `./init` and `./detect` subpath exports for downstream packages.

highlights.title: `mushi-mushi` `0.3.0` (NEW, unscoped)
highlights.description: One-command launcher â€” `npx mushi-mushi` runs the wizard. Gives the SDK a single brand entry point on npm so users don't have to know to look under `@mushi-mushi/*` first.

highlights.title: `create-mushi-mushi` `0.3.0` (NEW)
highlights.description: `npm create mushi-mushi` â€” same wizard via the standard npm-create convention.

highlights.title: All 16 published packages
highlights.description: keyword sweep â€” every package now ships `mushi-mushi` plus its framework-specific terms (`react`, `next.js`, `vue`, `nuxt`, `svelte`, `sveltekit`, `angular`, `react-native`, `expo`, `capacitor`, `ionic`, etc.) plus product terms (`session-replay`, `screenshot`, `shake-to-report`, `sentry-companion`, `error-tracking`, `ai-triage`) for npm search ranking.

highlights.title: All SDK READMEs
highlights.description: discoverability cross-link header at the top â€” points users to the wizard and to every other framework SDK so people who land on `@mushi-mushi/react` can find `@mushi-mushi/vue` and vice-versa.

highlights.title: Root README
highlights.description: quick-start now leads with `npx mushi-mushi`, with the manual install path documented as the fallback. Packages table gains a row for the launcher.
